title: solanum tectum
intro: Solanum tectum, also known as the wall-flowered nightshade, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Solanaceae family. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its leaves, which contain glycoalkaloids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, that have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Solanum tectum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and exhibit antimicrobial and antioxidant properties. Solanum tectum is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and its leaves can also be dried and used in capsule or tincture form for medicinal purposes.
